behavior_summary: The process U8P_STMEGG::hatch runs an egg-hatching sequence for the current item instance ('this').

On start it triggers audiovisual effects (camera quake and SFX), computes a tile/index from the egg and a stored index from a spawn/context item, and compares them to choose which spawn routine to call.

If the stored index (Item::getQ on a referenced item) equals the egg's map/tile index (Item::getMapArray(this) & 0x1F), it spawns the STMITE-specific routine; otherwise it calls a fallback/free spawn routine.
The routine suspends/waits for the spawned process to progress/finish (spawn return stored to a temporary/pid), then stops the camera quake and destroys the egg item (Item::destroy(this)) as cleanup.
notable_control_flow: Start: Camera::startQuake(0x04) and playSFX(0x31) to signal U8P_STMEGG::hatch begin.
Decision: local2 = Item::getQ(addressof(local1)), local3 = Item::getMapArray(this) & 0x1F, then if local2 == local3 choose STMITE spawn path else fallback FREE spawn path.
Spawn: call either addressof(local1)->STMITE::func00AE() or spawn ->FREE::func1C19(0x00000000); capture return into a temp/pid and suspend to wait.
End: Camera::stopQuake(), then Item::destroy(this) to remove the egg item.
A timing/delay expression (0x14 * 0x20) appears in the sequence and is likely related to wait/timing, but its exact placement/use is not explicit.
open_questions: What exact data Item::getQ returns and how it is assigned/populated on the referenced item (inferred from comparison use; confidence: medium).

What the spawned STMITE::func00AE and FREE::func1C19 processes specifically create or control (creature type, animations, or further behaviors) — only the spawn targets are visible (confidence: medium).
How the 0x14h * 0x20h expression is used (timing/delay vs. parameter) in the visible excerpt — its role is inferred but not shown (confidence: low).
Exact semantics of suspend/wait in this context (whether waiting for process completion or a specific state) — inferred from common patterns (confidence: medium).

main_function.name: U8P_STMEGG::hatch
main_function.purpose: Run the egg hatching sequence: start visual/sound effects, determine correct spawn variant by comparing an item-stored index to the egg's map/tile index, spawn the chosen process, wait for it, stop effects, and destroy the egg item.
entry_conditions: Invoked as a process (processType 0x0210) — likely started when an egg item begins hatching (timer or activation).
Operates on the current item context ('this') which is treated as the egg instance.

function_map.name: U8P_STMEGG::hatch
function_map.role: Orchestrates the U8P_STMEGG::hatch sequence for an egg item (effects, spawn selection, wait, cleanup).

function_map.name: Camera::startQuake
function_map.role: Begin camera shake used for U8P_STMEGG::hatch visual feedback.

function_map.name: Item::getQ
function_map.role: Read a stored uword/index from an item referenced by local1; used for spawn selection.

function_map.name: Item::getMapArray
function_map.role: Read map-related data for 'this' (egg) and mask to get the map/tile index for comparison.

function_map.name: STMITE::func00AE
function_map.role: Primary spawn target invoked when the item-stored index matches the egg's map/tile index (STMITE variant).

function_map.name: FREE::func1C19
function_map.role: Fallback spawn invoked when the indices do not match; likely spawns a default/fallback creature or runs cleanup behavior.

function_map.name: Camera::stopQuake
function_map.role: Stop camera shake at the end of U8P_STMEGG::hatch sequence.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Remove/destroy the egg item instance as final cleanup.

external_calls.purpose: Start a camera shake effect at U8P_STMEGG::hatch start.
Retrieve an index/uword from a referenced item (local1) used to decide spawn branch.
Obtain map/tile data for the egg ('this') and mask to produce a comparable index.
Spawn the STMITE-specific process when index comparison matches (primary case).
Fallback spawn when index comparison does not match.
Stop the U8P_STMEGG::hatch camera shake after spawned process proceeds/completes.
Destroy the egg item as cleanup at sequence end.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: The process U8P_STMEGG::hatch runs an egg-hatching sequence for the current item instance ('this').
